ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the article */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the article */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the article was published */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal where the article was published */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the article */,
  "article_type" TEXT /* Type of article (e.g., journal article, conference paper, book chapter) */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Publication status of the article (e.g., published, in press, under review) */,
  "article_url" TEXT /* URL of the article */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the uploaded file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the uploaded file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) */,
  "eissn" TEXT /* Electronic International Standard Serial Number (eISSN) */,
  "publisher_url" TEXT /* URL of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID identifier of the author */,
  "researcher_id" TEXT /* ResearcherID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_authors" (
  "article_id" TEXT /* ID of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "article_id" TEXT /* ID of the cited article */,
  "citing_article_id" TEXT /* ID of the citing article */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date the citation was made */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., self-citation, co-author citation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_citing_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("citing_article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID identifier of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "group_type" TEXT /* Type of group (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_members" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the group (e.g., admin, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "article_id" TEXT /* ID of the article being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the article */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group being shared with */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date the article was shared */,
  "share_type" TEXT /* Type of share (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_shares_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_shares_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "article_id" TEXT /* ID of the article */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "article_id" TEXT /* ID of the article */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "tag_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_metrics" (
  "article_id" TEXT /* ID of the article */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., views, downloads, citations) */,
  "metric_value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "metric_name", "metric_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" TEXT /* ID of the article being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)
column_names: ID of the journal where the article was published
Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the article
Type of article (e.g., journal article, conference paper, book chapter)
Publication status of the article (e.g., published, in press, under review)
Order of the author in the article
Type of citation (e.g., self-citation, co-author citation)
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin)
Role of the user in the group (e.g., admin, member)
ID of the article being shared
ID of the user sharing the article
ID of the group being shared with
Status of the version (e.g., draft, published)
Name of the metric (e.g., views, downloads, citations)
ID of the article being commented on
ID of the user making the comment
